title: Readable Enchanted Books
body:
# Reading Enchanted Books
This DataPack enables you to read Enchanted Books, as if they were written books! To read an enchanted book, just hold down right-click. These books are filled with mysterious unique texts... ![The Text inside an enchanted Book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76cc8a2b981d97cc86716ffaac74681ee61fa3c9.png)

# Enchanted Book copying
You can also copy enchanted books, by using a new recipe in the crafting table! All you need is the enchanted book you want to copy and a book and quill. (Note: Minecraft forces you to use the recipe book to copy the book for some reason.)![The crafting recipe for copying an enchanted book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91f7fedef81c5d2e5f93d66e60eba3ba66c257f8.png)
To use this new book, you need to pay a specific amount of levels, dependent on the amount of enchantments the book has. If you have enough levels, right-click the book, whilst it is in your mainhand. This will unlock it.![The cost to unlock a enchanted book](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c8aab4a89469fa673d556068c84efcd2e5addec.png)



### YOU CAN ALSO TURN OF THE COPYING FEATURE!
### To disable it, run this as an admin.
```
/function #minecraft:readable_books_settings
```
